egovframeBatCore.reason: local eGovFrame mirror contains MVC, common, and logging artifacts only; Spring Batch job already verifies restart/idempotency without adding a remote-only runtime dependency

fdlLogging.constraint: do not import eGovFrame logging types outside backend support runtime verification

fdlProperty.constraint: Spring Boot configuration remains the source of truth until a control-plane-only PoC proves value

fdlIdgnr.constraint: UUID, database IDs, receipt tokens, and security identifiers must not move to eGovFrame ID generation

pslDataaccess.constraint: current production persistence stays on Spring JDBC/JdbcTemplate and Flyway-managed schema

fdlAccess.constraint: admin/operator auth stays on Spring Security and does not cross token or crypto boundaries

fdlExcel.constraint: exports must prove memory, privacy, and CI cost before adding Excel-specific runtime dependencies

mustNotDo: move mobile or public JSON contracts to eGovFrame types
replace token, crypto, receipt, or auth boundaries with eGovFrame starters
add remote-only eGovFrame dependencies without lockfile and local mirror evidence
